headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.iubenda.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.iubenda.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.iubenda.com; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.iubenda.com; frame-src https://*.iubenda.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
